result.stdout:
USAGE: fsix [--help] [--sln <fileName>] [--proj <filename>]
            [--dir <workingDirectory>] [--daemon <host> <port>]
            [--reference:<assemblyFileName>] [--load:<fileName>]
            [--use:<fileName>] [--lib [<folderList>...]] [--other [<args>...]]

OPTIONS:

    --sln <fileName>      loads all sources and dependencies for given solution.
    --proj <filename>     loads all sources and dependencies for given fsproj
                          file.
    --dir <workingDirectory>
                          specifies alternative working directory to current
                          directory.
    --daemon <host> <port>
                          Starts daemon and lisening for json-rpc requests on
                          given address and port.
    --reference, -r:<assemblyFileName>
                          makes code from an F# or .NET Framework assembly
                          available to the code being compiled.
    --load:<fileName>     compiles the given source code at startup and loads
                          the compiled F# constructs into the session.
    --use:<fileName>      tells the interpreter to use the given file on
                          startup as initial input. If it contains prompt
                          configuration, it'd be used for this REPL.
    --lib, -l [<folderList>...]
                          specifies a directory to be searched for assemblies
                          that are referenced.
    --other [<args>...]   Any other arguments which will be passed to fsi.exe
    --help                display this list of options.
